title: openssh bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[8.7p1-46.0.2]
- Upstream references found with /usr/bin/ssh [Orabug: 37814929]

[8.7p1-46.0.1]
- upstream: fix AuthorizedPrincipalsCommand when AuthorizedKeysCommand [Orabug: 37647064]
- Update upstream references [Orabug: 36564626]

[8.7p1-46]
- Move the redhat help message to debug1 log level
  Resolves: RHEL-104580
full_text:
[8.7p1-46.0.2]
- Upstream references found with /usr/bin/ssh [Orabug: 37814929]

[8.7p1-46.0.1]
- upstream: fix AuthorizedPrincipalsCommand when AuthorizedKeysCommand [Orabug: 37647064]
- Update upstream references [Orabug: 36564626]

[8.7p1-46]
- Move the redhat help message to debug1 log level
  Resolves: RHEL-104580

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20607-0.html
